name: fw
description: Guide software project work from shaping and execution through review, branch finishing, and reusable repo knowledge.

interface.shortDescription: Make the next repo change faster
interface.longDescription: Guide repo work through shaping, execution, review, branch finishing, and captured lessons so each completed task leaves better context behind for the next one.
defaultPrompt: Use $fw:start to route this task through the right Flywheel stage.
Use $fw:research when the immediate job is topic investigation or current best-practice discovery that should sharpen ideation, brainstorming, review, or planning.
Use $fw:setup to prove repo and machine readiness before work starts.
Use $fw:run to coordinate one bounded task through the remaining Flywheel stages.
Use $fw:architecture-strategy, $fw:pattern-recognition, $fw:maintainability, or $fw:simplify when a focused architecture or code-quality pass is the real need.
Use $fw:docs to refresh project docs after implementation changes setup, APIs, CLI flows, config, or user workflows.
